titleStmt.title: SII 29.86: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 86. (A.R. No. B. 759 of 1962-63.) GORṬA, BHALKI TALUK, BIDAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab lying in the field of Saṅkarappa Biradar.
The record contains genealogical accounts of Chālukya Tribhuvanamalla and his feudatory chief.

It registers gifts of lands, house-sites, money income etc for the worship, offerings, rangabhōga and sahasrōpachāra to the god Rudrēśvara in agrahāra Gōranṭe and also for maintaining the students and teachers of an educational institution attached to the temple by Rudra-chamūpa and the mahājanās of Piriya-Gōranṭe. The record contains details of grants and the beneficiary sections. Among these Kannaḍāksharada khaṇḍike and vyākhyāna chhātraru attracts our attention.
The record was composed by [Parmmāka] Mallapayya. The record is badly damaged and worn out. Hence, much of the information including the date is lost. It is in the 11th century A.D. characters.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© jayatyā viṣkṛtaṁ viṣṇōrvvārāhaṁ kṣōbhitārṇnavaṁ dakṣiṇōṁnnata daṁṣṭrāgra viśrāṁta bhuvanaṁ vapuḥ . namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdra cāmara cāravē trailōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . vṛtta . śrī divijēṁdra sāṁdra makuṭadyuti vaṁdita pāda pīṭha nātmōdita padma
saṁjanita paṁkaja garbbhanaśēṣa lōka saṁpādana rakṣeṇaika caturaḥ sakaḷātmana saṁntana mṟu ta śrīdayitaṁ dayage yva vṛttiyanipa siddhiyaṁ . śrī madhu kaustubhaṁ berasu pālgaḍaliṁdoge taṁdu līḷeyiṁdāvana vakṣadoḷnela si
daṁ duraṁ seyiṁ dharitri munnāvana ṟiṁdogeda sākuḷadiṁ nelegoṁḍu nindaḷādēvi navantana kṣaya sukha sura nargghya ratnōjvaḷa vaścuṁbitaṁ śrī padaṁ pārvvatī vara [kṣōjā ?]ta śuṁbhadgha
vakṣasthaḷa jāhnavī sikara mukta mauḷikārā takapiḷajaḷa śāśvata śaṁbhu rudrēśvara dēvaṁ dēva dēvaṁ tribhuvana ṁ kūrttu rakṣaka nemmaṁ . karmmajñānasvarūpaṁ triguṇa [ka ] raṁ divya yōgīśvarāṁtaḥ karaṇābhōjāta pīṭhaṁ prithavi parivṛtaṁ sūryya
kōṭi prabhā bhāsurakarṇnaṁ sōma sūryyaniḷa śikhijaḷa nimūrtti rudrēśvara dēvaṁ dēvadēvaṁ tribhuvana janakaṁ kūrttu nammaṁ . kamaḷā kāṁteya kamaḷa kaḍōḷa pātrargga dāḷapa hastacchra vāravyomaṁ dā
ruṇa jaḷanidhi kudhara vāsi tama(dyu) tama srarcura stara puṇya guṇaniḷayaṁ śrī madrudrēśvararanavarataṁ rakṣisa nammaṁ . śāśvata saukhya yajjakajjanava kāraṇaṁ
vādi yōgīsvara yōga seṭage camūpati rudramaṁge rudrēśva prabhuge vā(di)jana nāgi vēda trayaṁ
nādi braṁhma caturvvirasa svāmiya citta doḷmuni manu svāyaṁ bhuva nātanamagaṁ karamiti nānā mesedaṁ tatu prabhugādaru praḷaya tarvvi krānta kunvigana dharmma dāṣa
ḍalarvvallabha priyasuta rccaḷukya vaṁśōttamara . kaṁda . śatapatra saṁbhava ti yenipā cāḷukya kuḷōdbhava negaḷe jayasiṁha mahipaṁ vijayāditya viṣṇuvarddhananā magaṁ . vṛtta . bhagavati koṭṭa bhavakoṭṭa vuge kamaḷākṣa
nakṣaya sukhāsvada niḻavarāha (ma)khya praśnarkvegāgāra vicittavāsu(ra)ma kuvara . satyāśraya vallabhaneṁba
yoḷēkaccatu māge rājyaṁgeydaṁ . Enisida satyāśraya dēvane cāḷukyānvaya kkaṁ . vṛtta . jayasiṁhanṛpa digvijaya doḷmēle saṁgrāma daṭṭahāra (niyō) rāmamadāyu grā
yoḷondu vijayalakṣmīpatiyā nṛpana vaṁśōdbhūtaṁ viśiṣṭa dhātriyanaḷdā ḷdannegaḻdadhi rāja rlakṣisi taṁnṛpa sutaṁ śrīkīrtti va
rmma maṁgaḷārṇnavanṛpaṁ tatsūnu satyāśrayaṁ . bhūbhujaṁgātma jaṁ satyāśraya
kuḷatiḷakarddhariṇī nātharādar . kaṁda . vijayāditya natanayaṁ bhujavikrama vikramaṁ vikramādityanṛpaṁge caḷukya
rāṣṭrakūṭa ḍava dahana . vṛttaṁ . ddāyōrdamāpattane bhujabaḷadi rāṣṭrakūṭa śrī ma
ttenala bhūpa . Enipānūrmmraḍi tailapaṁge tanayaṁ satyāśrayaṁ taṁnṛpāḷana putraṁ ma pracaṁḍa vibhu cakraṁ vikramāditya nātana vairībha siṁhaṁ nṛsiṁhāri jayasiṁha nātana magaṁ traiḷōkya mallanripaṁ . Eṟagada vīra
raṇa yāreṁdeṁḍaṁ virō vīśvara rjjanada hatiri havamalla dēvana magaṁ sōmēśvaraṁ taṁnṛpāḷana
saṁkuḷa kirīṭa nargghya māṇikya nūtana kāntipradarājya tpada śrī vikramāditya dēvaṁ nṟipaṁ vikrama bhūpaniṁ tādi śēṣa mādi nṛpaṁ tānena
sakaḷa bhuvanadalesedaṁ . vṛttaṁ . puragādhīśaṁ bā syaṁgādhīśaṁ bhāvi kamaḷa sarōja dāvāni kaḷāśva kīrti cakrēśvaraṁ bhuja śikharōjva
kramadiṁ tuvara binaṁ niṣkaṁṭakaṁ māḍi (ḍiga) rāyara dēva māpavadhāṟi (negaḷdu) ko cakrēśvaraṁ . Udadhiparītaṁ bhūvaḷeyāmaṁ paripāḷisu
dghaśauryya saṁpadaṁ ḷādi maḷidmarddā (manēśvara budha) śakanna manakīrtti yaniḷeyoḷ cāḷukya vi
kramābdaṁ sahasra saledi(sā) maṁḍaḷa hermma vikrama nṛpana [. va .] Enenegaḷda vikramādityana taiśvaryyāma
vi cāḷukya vikrama cakrēśvarane cci dayaṁgeyda vi vikramā seya sēnādhīśatva mu
bhūpaṁ samasta taṁtrādhi ra saṁpatti yumaṁ . Enisida rudracamānāthana neṁbaṁ . tattanūjaṁ
nananuttama brati bharadvāja . bharadvāja saṁtatiyiṁdaṁ negaḻda viṣayadoḷ śōbhā
mana poḷesutirppadu tardavāḍiyada ṟoḷmaṭhagrahāraṁ munivara śrī budhajana vinutaṁ ka bhūya kabhōga dēvaṁ
nāgēṁdraṁ tanagagrajanāge pesarnnāga rājanene negaḻdattā nāga kuḷa bhūṣaṇa nātana kaiyiṁde viḍisi
hēśvara . Enisida nāgadēva prabhuge vudayāditya nādaṁ tanūjaṁ dharmmaṁ japa vaṁśāgrati negaḻdu dayādityanā
ditya tējaṁ . ka . manu sida cāritraṁ dinapa suta nenisidārppadi naṁdana nenisida
rataṁ . vṛtta . jagadoḷtadnajasaṁ podaḷdu diṁda śrī natakṣōṇīdharaṁ śrīdharaṁ . kaṁda .
nuḍiyoḷṟusiya cittadoḷoḍa baṁda dharmmado kama ppudu durllabha menisida nuḍi cala doḷage vina śrīdadhinātha bhṛtya
vinayaṁ satyavudāra dharmmavibhavaṁ dānakṣamā vṛttiyeṁbinituṁ maṁgaḷa bhūṣaṇaṁgaḷene japamaṁ pradihāramaṁ . kaṁda . . vṛtta . sarasijanābhana
maṁ bhaktiyoḷarccisidā ṁ dharāmaranivahaṁgaḷa taṇipi pigaḷaṁ prabhu vanājjaḻadhi prabhuge traya mudiyipavo
le puṭṭidī śrīdharaṁga tyaudāryya śrīviḷāsaṁ dvija kuḷatiḷakaṁ rudradēvaṁ satata manunibhava nidaḻa Amṟutāṁ bōrāśiyoḷ caṁdra manudi yi
pa vo(ṁśa) jaduddhuni rccemahībhṛtkūṭadoḷbhā nuḍiyipa volpe vinayaṁ dhātrige mā
saṁvarddhani ya viśuddha nāmavāripaṁ caṇḍa śrī caṁdrā . mahōdma kāravaridā Ādya nāḷpavanu vacasaṁ vacanakke takka vinaya
kanakādri pra sādu
maṇigaḷa dāna dāgi tta mirddu
cāḷukya lakṣmī lasitaṁ banagada puradā vitrihatra radaścāri dyuta
dādyaya kprame maruḷagaḷa rada (ṟa)da baṁma yarima rudra nāga
vāla braṁhma didana
vādi satpa saṁpasamaṁ baṇnisale ninna ḷaviya śrī rudra
ḍu vasuṁdhare baṇnise negaḻdavi caritārtthaṁ
ta jana cintāmaṇi śaraṇāgata rakṣāmaṇiyene negaḻdu dayādityaṁ . Ene
ma kara gāramanudayādityaṁ cāru
muṁ vaḷadara dharmma naṁte jagaṁ pogaḻe vibhu rudradēva negaḻga śrī jyani
kṣatayuga prāpa budhiru ḷa niharāda rāpuru
lliva para dhātrī da jana ge ruḍiyesida
va hākri miṁgaraṇa vāvana maraṇeyiṁ pogaḷe sudēvaṇarā prayā
damaged
rāma dēvarasa mudayādri
ya bahavaḷi dōrppaḍi tēja tamāḷva dharma
mauḷitāṁghri latanudāṁ pudinega
vatasyana mōḷā ra dvirddutānā reya nati
kīrti lōkaṁ dharitri (taḷa)ka vadhari
damaged
purigaḷu (damaged)
tavimaḷa yaśō(dhara) palaviṁjava viṭṭa
dadāri pura muṭṭaya
damaged
haṁjikēśvarada lōduva mūṟu
vēdada brāhmaṇara vartane mēlādavugaḷa hosakā tavaddāradatā tāṇakke vṛtti 1 kannaḍākṣarada khaṇḍikege vṛtti 1 Aggiṣṭagege vṛtti 1 dharmmētakke vṛtti 1 Ā ga brāhma
ṇara bhōjanakke vṛtti 4 khaṇḍikeya vidyārtthi māṇigaḷa bhōjanakke vyākhyānada cchātrara bhōjanakke vṛtti 3 hāra le nivēśana ma koṁdumane gaḷige ya vasatiya lirppa brāhmaṇargge vṛtti 20 vṛttigaḷa lpu
ṭṭida dravya maṁdānavallade lladaṟiṁ vṛttigaḷa deseyalādi krayaṁ vṛttigaḷa nivēśanaṁgaḷa dēvarīpura barage nivēśanaṁgaḷilla barageyda nivēśanagaḷellaṁ dēvara sōmā modalāda yōgakṣēma
muṁ yuvallavī dāna brāhmaṇara vivaroḷage dharmmama sāraydu vupēkṣisidaḍe brāhmaṇaṁge virōdhigaḷādoḍaṁ durācāra rādoḍāvū barage mahājanaṁgaḷu vṛttigaḷoḷpaṭṭada dravyamanavaṁge koḍḷa salladā
parihārakke svāmigaḷuṁ vṛtta maruvāgi nōḍi vicārisi Uṁ barageydu mahājanaṁgaḷu gōraṁṭeyapura brāhmaṇaruṁ nilisuvaru . dharmmakke biṭṭa vṛttigaḷoḷpuṭṭida dravya manakṣatama mānā rāgi tarisi
dēvara pūje punaskāra naivēdya raṁgabhōgavādiyāgi sahasrōpacārakke pūjārigaḷu pu gi dēvara parigrahakkaṁ koṭṭu saṁvarisiyadariṁ ydu dēvara brahmapuri
yāgiddirppattu mānasa brāhmaṇara naḍeyisuvaralliya yōgakṣēma vellavavara bhāra . khaṁ ḍike yu ḷudu tā nāḍaggiṣṭageyavaru dēvara samopadali (lugra) daṁ vigaḍidararppadavara kaḷadu mattōrbbara nikkisuva
va rāmadēyagevina salladu . Ā mattavā piriya gōraṁṭeyaśēṣa mahājanaṁgaḷu biṭṭa tāḍi kōla mattaru manaḷipisutāṟidigaḷāda varggekurukṣētra prayāga bāṇarāsiyeṁba tīrtthaṁgaḷallū
ra kavilegaḷa koṁda pāpa lēsāgi rakṣisi ḷallāsira kavilegaḷa . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vāyō harētuvasuṁdharāṣaṣṭi
rṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyā(ṁ) jāyatē krimiḥ . vṛtta . dharaṇī dēviya ratna bhūṣaṇadavole cilvāge gōraṁṭeyuttaṁ digbhāgadoḷoḻda sida nī lōkaṁga sthira vappaṁtire rudradēva vibhuvatyāścaryya
sauṁdaryya renāḍāya sōmarayyadēva bhavanaṁ brātādi dharmaṁgaḷaṁ . Esevī dharmmama nōldu rakṣisuvava tada dēvaṁgaśvamēdha sahasra makku vakrisuvage kurubhūmi gaṁge gaye yeṁbī
kṣētra doḷādi tāpasi gobrāhaṇaraṁ ka(ṟu)ttaṟeda pāpa poddugu nireyaṁ . parama yāḷige rudra vibhuge gōraṁṭeyoḷu nira kava nārāyaṇa mātṛgaṇālakṣmī viṣṇugauri mahēśvara (nāgādi) ha rudrara
śrī nṛsiṁha paritātmaja pannagābdi śayanaṁ dīrgghāyumaṁ śrī yu maṁ . dhareyeṁduṁ beḷeyuttu ksa satataṁ permmāḍidēvaṁ vasuṁdhareyaṁ pāḷi tikke dhārmmikka jana kkoḷpakke santaṁ nirantara gōbrāhmaṇa śāniyakke jagavuḷannaṁ
tirkke vistaradi rudra camūpa dharmmavinavaṁ bhadraṁ śubhaṁ maṁgaḷaṁ . © nirati śaya māge rudrēśvarakke śāsanada kabbamaṁ vistaradiṁ parammāka mallapayyaṁ viracisidani desege jagadoḷā caṁdrārkkaṁ . mattamā piriya gōraṁṭeya
li voladaynūṟa ṟoḷage toga(lū)ra baṭṭeyādi yāgi biṭṭa mattalu 50 .
Digital edition of SII 29.86 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
